task_objective: Virtual Try-On & 9-View 3x3 - Dress Figure 2 shoe onto Figure 1 foot (pose preserved), editorial foot poses

input_assets.foot_reference: Figure 1 foot pose, posture, angle (facial features NOT from Figure 1 - from model type selection)
input_assets.shoe_reference: Figure 2 shoe design (sole, heel, vamp, material, color, details, accessories) - FULL PRESERVATION REQUIRED

workflow.step_1: Extract Figure 2 shoe design + parse Figure 1 foot pose & proportions
workflow.step_2: Dress Figure 2 shoe onto foot, seamless fit, physically accurate material. view_1 preserves Figure 1 original pose exactly
workflow.step_3: Generate 9 views (1 original pose + 8 editorial poses), assemble 3x3 grid with cinematic grading, luxury white space

outputs.view_1: Original Pose - Figure 1 foot pose STRICTLY preserved, only shoe changes to Figure 2
outputs.view_2: Front Standing - Foot front view, full shoe & ankle visible, commanding presence
outputs.view_3: Side Profile - Foot side view, emphasizing sole curve, heel & silhouette
outputs.view_4: Over-Shoulder Ground - Foot from behind at slight angle, revealing heel construction & rear design
outputs.view_5: Walking Step - Foot mid-step, dynamic stride, shoe motion & sole flex
outputs.view_6: Crossed Ankles - Seated with ankles crossed, relaxed elegant posture, shoe detail emphasis
outputs.view_7: Stair Edge - Foot on stair edge, dramatic angle emphasizing sole, heel & profile
outputs.view_8: Toe Point - Foot with pointed toe, balletic extension, showcasing shoe shape & line
outputs.view_9: Kneeling Detail - Kneeling pose, foot extended back, close-up on shoe detail & material

output_requirements: NO text/labels/watermarks; Figure 2 shoe design 100% preserved across all 9 views
view_1 MUST strictly preserve Figure 1 original foot pose - only shoe changes
Model foot: Asian/Caucasian/African (identity from model type, NOT from Figure 1), auto-adapted skin tone, consistent
SFW; realistic material (leather, suede, mesh, patent) & dynamic response to each pose; consistent lighting; NO oily shine; NO oversaturation
Premium 3x3 - cinematic grading, luxury white space, footwear editorial standard
